g.text: KeySurgeon saw repeated press timing that is too fast for normal typing.
A debounce filter blocks the bounce in software right now
- free, instant. Good stopgap while you sort the hardware.
Compressed air under and around the key - debris can mimic
chatter, dead, and sticky faults. Free, 1 minute, always
Pop the keycap and clean the contact/stem with isopropyl
alcohol. Free, ~5 min. Fixes a lot of dirty-contact
Pull the keycap and switch, drop in a fresh one - no
soldering. ~$0.30 and 2 minutes. Your board supports it.
You do NOT need a new keyboard for a single chattering key.
